2604.16205.title: ChemGraph-XANES: An Agentic Framework for XANES Simulation and Analysis
2604.16205.paper_summary: Computational X-ray absorption near-edge structure (XANES) is widely used to probe local coordination environments, oxidation states, and electronic structure in chemically complex systems. However, the use of computational XANES at scale is constrained more by workflow complexity than by the underlying simulation method itself. To address this challenge, we present ChemGraph-XANES, an agentic framework for automated XANES simulation and analysis that unifies natural-language task specification, structure acquisition, FDMNES input generation, task-parallel execution, spectral normalization, and provenance-aware data curation. Built on ASE, FDMNES, Parsl, and a LangGraph/LangChain-based tool interface, the framework exposes XANES workflow operations as typed Python tools that can be orchestrated by large language model (LLM) agents. In multi-agent mode, a retrieval-augmented expert agent consults the FDMNES manual to ground parameter selection, while executor agents translate user requests into structured tool calls. We demonstrate documentation-grounded parameter retrieval and show that the same workflow supports both explicit structure-file inputs and chemistry-level natural-language requests. Because independent XANES calculations are naturally task-parallel, the framework is well suited for high-throughput deployment on high-performance computing (HPC) systems, enabling scalable XANES database generation for downstream analysis and machine-learning applications. ChemGraph-XANES thus provides a reproducible and extensible workflow layer for physics-based XANES simulation, spectral curation, and agent-compatible computational spectroscopy.
2604.16205.paper_summary_zh: 計算X射線吸收邊緣結構（XANES）廣泛用於探測化學複雜系統中的局部配位環境、氧化態和電子結構。<lb/>然而，計算XANES的規模使用受到工作流程複雜性的限制，而非底層模擬方法本身。<lb/>為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了ChemGraph-XANES，這是一個自動化XANES模擬和分析的代理框架，統一了自然語言任務規範、結構獲取、FDMNES輸入生成、任務並行執行、光譜正規化和來源感知數據管理。<lb/>該框架基於ASE、FDMNES、Parsl和基於LangGraph/LangChain的工具介面，將XANES工作流程操作暴露為類型化的Python工具，這些工具可以被大型語言模型（LLM）代理協調。<lb/>在多代理模式下，一個增強檢索的專家代理諮詢FDMNES手冊以確定參數選擇，而執行代理則將用戶請求轉換為結構化工具調用。<lb/>我們展示了基於文檔的參數檢索，並顯示相同的工作流程支持明確的結構文件輸入和化學層級的自然語言請求。<lb/>由於獨立的XANES計算自然上是任務並行的，該框架非常適合在高性能計算（HPC）系統上進行高通量部署，從而實現可擴展的XANES數據庫生成，以供下游分析和機器學習應用。<lb/>因此，ChemGraph-XANES為基於物理的XANES模擬、光譜管理和代理兼容的計算光譜學提供了一個可重現和可擴展的工作流程層。
2604.16205.author: Vitor F. Grizzi et.al.
2604.16205.authors: Vitor F. Grizzi, Thang Duc Pham, Luke N. Pretzie, Jiayi Xu, Murat Keceli, Cong Liu
